label: Total AGI
definition_note: Total adjusted gross income by source in CBO individual income tax details

label: Total employment income
definition_note: Wages and salaries included in CBO adjusted gross income by source

label: Taxable interest and ordinary dividends excluding qualified dividends
definition_note: CBO row excludes qualified dividends; do not combine this with broad dividend income that already includes qualified dividends

label: Qualified dividends
definition_note: Qualified dividend income reported separately from taxable interest and ordinary dividends

label: Net capital gain
definition_note: CBO net capital gain income source from individual income tax details

label: Net business income
definition_note: CBO net business income is broader than narrow self-employment income and should not be mapped to self_employment_income without review
